message:
feat(robot): wire dismiss-alert to tracker backend and add palette favorites/recent/usage

Alert dismissal:
- GetDismissAlert now resolves alerts through the global tracker via
  ManualResolve instead of a stub no-op
- Session scoping: --dismiss-all respects --dismiss-session filter
- Proper error responses for missing alerts and session mismatches
- DismissAlertOutput gains dismissed_count, dismissed_ids, and session
- PrintDismissAlert and GetDismissAlert accept *config.Config to
  initialize tracker settings

Palette enhancements:
- Commands carry IsFavorite, IsPinned, UseCount fields derived from
  config.PaletteState and command history
- Output includes Favorites, Pinned (filtered to visible keys) and
  Recent (last 8 palette-sourced history entries scoped to session)
- Categories list is now insertion-ordered instead of map-iteration order
- hasPaletteKey helper for normalized set membership

Tests cover single-alert dismissal, session mismatch rejection,
dismiss-all by session, and palette state/recent/usage propagation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
